narrative:
Springboro City 2-B (precinct in Warren County) has 817 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.9 percentage points.
